title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Miniklub - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Miniklub - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Miniklub. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Digital Marketing Manager to strengthen our Bhubaneswar-based team.

About Miniklub:
Miniklub is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Magento

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Miniklub!
